declaredLane: Garage draft evaluation cohesion and MinReadySlots single source
observedMutationClass: GarageDraftEvaluation.Evaluate consolidation, radar VM build colocated with result builder, PublishGarageDraftStateUseCase MinReadySlots alignment, presentation compose guard helpers on GarageDraftEvaluation
acceptanceEvidenceClass: C# compile, feature presentation lint, rules lint, EditMode PublishGarageDraftStateDirectTests and GaragePagePresenterDirectTests
rootCause: Draft evaluation lived in a separate static Evaluator while GarageDraftEvaluation already owned the DTO surface, and radar VM lived in a standalone factory only referenced from the result builder. PublishGarageDraftStateUseCase used a hardcoded minimum slot count that could drift from GarageRoster.MinReadySlots used by the UI roster summary.
prevention: Keep draft orchestration on GarageDraftEvaluation.Evaluate only; do not reintroduce GarageDraftEvaluator. Keep radar construction next to GarageResultViewModelBuilder or a single result-panel owner. When changing MinReadySlots, update PublishGarageDraftStateUseCase via GarageRoster.MinReadySlots only and extend PublishGarageDraftStateDirectTests if messaging changes. Prefer GarageDraftEvaluation.TryGetComposeUnavailableMessageWhenDraftComplete / TryGetComposedUnitForStatsBlock for duplicate compose guard chains. This change preserves the existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, and progress evidence overload.
verification: dotnet build Assembly-CSharp.csproj --no-restore -v:minimal; dotnet build Assembly-CSharp-Editor.csproj --no-restore -v:minimal; npm run --silent feature:presentation:lint; npm run --silent rules:lint; Unity EditMode: PublishGarageDraftStateDirectTests, GaragePagePresenterDirectTests
